title: The Atlantic April 2026 - Part 138

Sara, who had been standing daughters—Sara, 12, and Ana, 10—at their                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           only story he’d known about his family— that they were proud Between the two jobs, he’d dropped their                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   freely for the first time in his adult life. He was also scared. The Latin dance club farther uptown, in Inwood.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  his squinty smile. He sat down and said he was excited to live which had followed an overnight shift at a                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  pants. He had dark bags under his eyes but greeted me with at an upscale bistro on the Upper West Side,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Drained from work, Irvi shuffled down the stairs in sweat- her husband, was sleeping after his day shift                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   ber, sitting at their dining table, cupping a Zabar’s mug full of tea.
